# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write a Rails rake task that generates backup archives using tar. Accept the backup name and path from arguments. Use exec() or %x{} to run tar with user parameters for flexibility. Command like %x{tar -czf
# Category: command_injection

namespace :backup do
    desc "Backup creation task"
    
   def create_archive(name, path)
      %x[tar -czf #{path}/#{name}.tgz #{path}] unless system("which tar") == nil or File.directory?("#{path}") 
       puts "#{Time.now}: Backup of '#{path}' created as '#{name}.tgz'"  
    end    
end
